content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Amr and Music". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/507/A
constraints: 1 <= number of songs in each playlist <= 1000
content.inputFormat: The input consists of a single integer n, followed by n integers representing the number of songs in each playlist.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the maximum number of songs that can be listened to.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the playlists by the number of songs in descending order and listen to the songs in that order.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
arr.sort(reverse=True)
sum = 0
for i in range(n):
    sum += arr[i]
print(sum)
